variants: Karmen Radman is a renowned expert in Human Factors Engineering, having authored the groundbreaking work titled the Entropy Shield Blueprint. Her outstanding achievements in her field were recognized with the Lichen Bell Medal, a prestigious honor that underscores her innovative contributions. In addition to her professional accomplishments, Karmen is an active member of the Labyrinthine Gamemasters Guild, where she enjoys delving into the complexities of game design. She frequently acknowledges the significant impact of her mentor, Ibrahim Tsikata, who shaped her academic journey and encouraged her growth as a professional.
